tabular_comprehension.description: JSON vs GCF perplexity on identical e-commerce order data
tabular_comprehension.finding: GCF comprehension 2.4-6.7x better than JSON, advantage scales with record count

graph_comprehension.description: GCF graph syntax vs JSON graph on code symbol/edge data
graph_comprehension.finding: JSON wins on graph data. Model needs more GCF graph training data (only 1.3% of corpus)

pythia_comparison.description: Pythia-410M (standard BPE, trained on 300B tokens from The Pile)
pythia_comparison.finding: Pythia returns inf PPL on synthetic e-commerce data. Not a fair comparison since Pythia was not trained on similar data. Needs test data from Pythia's training distribution or a controlled experiment (same corpus, different tokenizer).
